This '''clone trooper commander''' was stationed on the [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Impavid/Legends|Impavid]]''. He wore [[Phase II clone trooper armor/Legends|armor]] with red markings, a [[Pauldron/Legends|pauldron]], and a [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpack]].<ref name="CW23" />

==Biography==
During the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]] in the final days of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], he led [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] along with [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]] in a space jump to capture the ''[[Prosperous/Legends|Prosperous]]'' after the ''Impavid'' was scuttled. His forces raided the bridge and took over the [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] controls.<ref name="CW23" />

==Equipment==
His armor resembled that of [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|ARC trooper]] [[Fordo]]'s [[Phase II clone trooper armor/Legends|armor]] due to the red markings and [[Pauldron/Legends|pauldron]]. He also utilized a [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpack]].<ref name="CW23" />

==Appearances==
